text.title: reranking-two-stage Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree for reranking-two-stage application; concludes with rule-id refs or skip.

decision-tree.root-question: Does recall@50 already meet target AND latency budget allows 100-300ms second stage?

branch.conclusion: Fix recall first (chunking, embedding, hybrid); rerank later.
Skip second stage; single-stage retrieval only.

example.trace: root → high recall + budget OK → r2-cross-encoder-second-stage
example.description: Recall@50 of 0.93 with 800ms budget → add cross-encoder rerank to reach precision target.
